prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约645→523→626，2024年明显前移后2025年回弹至626名，近3年波动区间约523–645名；2025年基准约626名；本省理 科计划2023–2025年均为55人，2026年增至56人，小幅扩招约1.8%，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2021–2024年第8名，2025–2026年 第9名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价偏正面，食堂全国第一、新闻传播学科排名稳居前列；抖音热度排名第22（较热），综合热度约222.6万，短视 频曝光量较高，报考关注度升温；近年无投档断档记录；光学工程、机械工程、电气工程3个A+，计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程等A级学科，临床医学A-；共17个A-及以上学科，工医实力突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程均为高热推荐，临床医学推荐，相关专业报考热度持 续高位；本省2026年考生总数约23.8万人（较2025年约7.65万大幅增长），按比例估算理科约16.3万人，竞争显著加剧，较2024年390分上升31 分，反映整体竞争强度上升；华中科技大学位于湖北武汉，在新疆理科招生约55–56人，占比较小；湖北非本省/邻省，无明显地域偏好优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次626名、2026年小幅扩招1人、考生规模大幅增长（理科约16.3万人）、声誉正面与抖音热度较热推高报考热度、，预计2026年竞争较2025年 略有加剧；预测最低位次约643名，区间570–716名。

- 人工智能（具身交互智能启明实验班）
- 计算机类（计算机学院）。

- 机械设计制造及其自动化（先进电子制造启明实验班）
- 计算机类（网安学院）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约643名，区间570–716名。位次在区间内建议以二档为主力、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间下限（≤570名）可重点冲击一档王牌专业（未来技术实验班、启 明实验班）；位次接近区间上限（≥716名）建议以三档为主，谨慎选择一档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science was approximately 645 → 523 → 626. In 2024, it moved significantly forward, then rebounded to 626 in 2025. The fluctuation range over the past three years is about 523–645. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 626. The provincial Science enrollment plan was 55 students from 2023 to 2025, increasing to 56 in 2026, a small expansion of about 1.8%, which has a limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 8th in the main list of Soft Science from 2021 to 2024, and 9th in 2025–2026, firmly among the top universities in the country. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is relatively positive, with the cafeteria ranked first nationally and the journalism and communication discipline consistently ranking among the top. Douyin popularity ranks 22nd (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 2.226 million, high short video exposure, and increasing application attention. There have been no records of enrollment gaps in recent years. It has three A+ disciplines: Optical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Electrical Engineering; A-level disciplines such as Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering; and A- in Clinical Medicine. A total of 17 disciplines are rated A- or above, with outstanding strength in engineering and medicine, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all highly recommended hot majors, and Clinical Medicine is also recommended. The application heat for related majors remains high. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 238,000 (a significant increase from about 76,500 in 2025). Estimated by proportion, there are about 163,000 Science candidates, leading to significantly intensified competition. Compared to the 2024 score of 390, it has increased by 31 points, reflecting the overall rise in competition intensity. Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and enrolls about 55–56 Science students in Xinjiang, accounting for a small proportion. Hubei is not the home province or a neighboring province, so there is no obvious regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 626, a small expansion of 1 student in 2026, a significant increase in the number of candidates (about 163,000 Science candidates), a positive reputation and relatively hot Douyin popularity driving up application heat, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 643, with a range of 570–716.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Future Technology Experimental Class)
- Clinical Medicine (Outstanding Physician Qiming Experimental Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Embodied Interactive Intelligence Qiming Experimental Class)
- Computer Science (School of Computer Science).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Electronic Information (School of Integrated Circuits)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation (Advanced Electronic Manufacturing Qiming Experimental Class)
- Computer Science (School of Cyber Science and Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Automation
- Mechanical Engineering
- Energy and Power Engineering
- Physics
- Biomedical Engineering
- Management Science and Engineering
- Clinical Medicine
- Cross-disciplinary Engineering (Future Technology Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 643, with a range of 570–716. If your ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main target, use Tier 1 for a stretch, and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (≤570), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 top majors (Future Technology Experimental Class, Qiming Experimental Class). If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (≥716), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2023–2025 liberal arts minimum rankings approximately 376→498→464, with a clear backward shift in 2024 followed by a slight forward shift to 464 in 2025, the fluctuation range over the past three years is approximately 376–498; the 2025 baseline is approximately 464; the provincial liberal arts enrollment plan from 2023–2025 is 5 students each year, and remains 5 in 2026, with the enrollment plan unchanged for four consecutive years, no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking 2021–2024 8th, 2025–2026 9th, firmly among the top universities nationwide; 2026 reputation evaluation is positive, canteen ranked first nationally, journalism and communication discipline ranking steadily among the top; Douyin popularity ranking 22nd (relatively hot), comprehensive popularity approximately 2.226 million, application attention is heating up; no record of enrollment gaps in recent years; journalism and communication A-, directly corresponding to liberal arts enrollment majors (Journalism and Communication, Public Administration); Public Administration corresponds to Business Administration A-, with strong disciplinary strength. Journalism and Communication has obvious social discouragement (Zhang Xuefeng effect continues), Public Administration has average popularity and is wait-and-see; the province's 2026 total number of examinees is approximately 238,000 (a significant increase from about 76,500 in 2025), estimated liberal arts about 74,700, an increase of more than three times compared to 24,000 in 2025, competition significantly intensifies, rising 26 points from the 2024 score of 425, reflecting increased competition intensity.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Huazhong University of Science and Technology is located in Wuhan, Hubei, with only 5 liberal arts enrollment spots in Xinjiang, a very small proportion; Hubei is not the home province or a neighboring province, with no obvious regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 464, the enrollment plan remaining unchanged, a significant increase in the number of examinees (liberal arts approximately 74,700), positive reputation pushing up popularity but the social discouragement of journalism and communication majors forming a hedge, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 479, with a range of 425–533.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Journalism and Communication (Journalism, Radio and Television, Advertising)
- Public Administration (Public Service Management, Administrative Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Public Administration (Public Service Management, Administrative Management)
- Journalism and Communication (Journalism, Radio and Television, Advertising).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 479, range 425–533. Only 2 liberal arts enrollment majors, if ranking is within the range, both majors are recommended for application; if ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (≤425), priority can be given to Journalism and Communication; if ranking is close to the upper limit (≥533), it is recommended to focus on Public Administration. Both majors have discipline evaluations at A- level, with strong strength.
